title: After the Japanese Derby: No Plan is the Best Plan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer gives it her all in the Japanese
Derby. She manages to push her way to the front
just before the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her rivals compliment her performance and some
people in the crowd begin to chant her name.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That night, after reviewing the day's race,
Daitaku Helios seems to have come up with some
kind of "god-tier" race plan.
